items.title: How a ban on religious symbols has triggered a Canadian constitutional debate
items.dek: Quebec's law to regulate religious symbols goes to the Supreme Court in a constitutional test case.
items.body: Quebec's law to regulate religious symbols goes to the Supreme Court in a constitutional test case.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Germany has a shortage of workers - so it's turning to India for help
items.dek: The European nation, struggling to find skilled staff, is giving jobs to young people from India.
items.body: The European nation, struggling to find skilled staff, is giving jobs to young people from India.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: France's Socialists hold onto power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
items.dek: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
items.body: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
items.author: IriLine Desk
